title: Garage Floor Coatings
description: Transform your garage with durable, beautiful epoxy and polyaspartic floor coatings that resist stains, chemicals, and daily wear.
intro: Your garage is more than storage — it's the first impression of your home. Our professional-grade coatings deliver showroom-quality floors that last decades.
features: One-day installation — drive on it the next day
Endless color, flake, and metallic finish options

title: Pool Deck Coatings
description: Cool-touch, slip-resistant pool deck coatings that look stunning and keep bare feet comfortable all summer long.
intro: A great pool deserves a great deck. Our textured, slip-resistant coatings keep surfaces cool to the touch while delivering a high-end resort look.
features: Cool-touch technology — up to 30% cooler surface
UV-stable colors that won't fade in California sun
Custom colors to match your outdoor aesthetic

title: Patio Coatings
description: Elevate your outdoor living space with decorative concrete coatings that are beautiful, durable, and low maintenance.
intro: Your patio is the heart of outdoor living. We coat, resurface, and transform tired concrete into stunning entertainment spaces that last.
features: Decorative flake, quartz, and metallic finishes

title: Driveway Coatings
description: Boost curb appeal and protect your driveway with professional-grade coatings that resist tire marks, oil, and weather damage.
intro: Your driveway sets the tone for your entire property. Our industrial-strength coatings resist hot tire pickup, oil stains, and California weather — while looking incredible.
features: Decorative flake and solid color options

title: Epoxy Flooring
description: Commercial and residential epoxy flooring systems built to handle heavy traffic, impacts, and daily abuse.
intro: From commercial warehouses to residential showrooms, our epoxy flooring systems deliver unmatched durability and a seamless, professional finish.
features: High-build epoxy systems for heavy traffic areas
Seamless, hygienic surface — ideal for commercial spaces
Metallic, flake, and solid color options

title: Residential & Commercial Painting
description: 30+ years of professional painting experience across San Luis Obispo County — interior, exterior, residential, and commercial.
intro: Matt Gifford has been painting homes and businesses across the Central Coast for over 30 years. From detailed trim work to full commercial repaints, we deliver flawless results every time.
features: Surface prep, repair, and priming included
